series.title: Ronja Räubertochter

albums.title: Ronja Räubertochter (Ungekürzte Lesungen)
albums.exclude_reason: Ungekürzte Lesung (audiobook reading), not Hörspiel. Duplicate story.

series.curator_notes: Ronja Räubertochter is a complete single-story Hörspiel (not an episodic series). Unlike typical DACH Hörspiel series with numbered episodes (Folge 1, 2, 3...), this is Astrid Lindgren's classic novel adapted as a complete radio play. The 1982 Oetinger AUDIO production (34 tracks) is the canonical German Hörspiel version. An unabridged audiobook reading (100 tracks) is excluded as it's a different format. No 'Retro-Archiv' or 'Junior' variants exist as this is a standalone classic release. The Swedish version 'Ronja Rövardotter' exists under the separate 'Astrid Lindgren' artist but is not part of the German DACH curation.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
